name: Synup vs Zceppa
hero_main_title: The Best Zceppa Alternative – Do Better in Everything Local
hero_summary: Don’t half-ass your local marketing efforts, Zceppa does everything but Synup does it all AND does it in a meaningful way. Our integrations and publisher networks are simply the best in the industry – so you don’t have to toggle between different platforms for wider coverage.
counter_text_1: say they effortlessly increased store visits
counter_text_2: 20% of businesses increased their online conversions year-over-year
counter_text_3: businesses seamlessly listed across key online platforms
section_2_heading: Synup's Unparalleled Features and Intuitive Dashboard Compared to Zceppa
section_2_summary: While Zceppa primarily focuses on Facebook and Google listings, Synup offers a comprehensive solution that caters to the diverse needs of multi-location brands across 60+ discovery sites. Here's what sets us apart:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Unlike Zceppa's limited integrations, Synup offers automated listing updates and syncs across 60+ discovery sites, ensuring your business is visible and accurately represented on all major platforms.
section_2_slider_2_summary: While Zceppa lacks robust analytics capabilities, Synup provides in-depth listing performance analytics and local rank-tracking tools, giving you handy insights into your local performance.
section_2_step_3_summary: Zceppa takes care of your reviews across a handful of platforms. In addition to monitoring and managing reviews, Synup also helps you acquire more positive reviews through seamless CRM and POS system integrations, boosting your online presence and credibility.
section_2_slider_4_heading: Local Content Management and AI Support
section_2_slider_4_summary: Zceppa lacks advanced capabilities for local content management, but Synup offers menu integration, product/service integration, and AI-powered automation, ensuring your local content is engaging and tailored to your customers' needs.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE-BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Local over Zceppa?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We don’t treat AI as a checkbox feature, our platform offers intuitive AI use cases to help with your everyday local marketing tasks – from responding to reviews to sharing local content.
why_choose_tab_desc_2: Synup offers superior integration capabilities, ensuring a seamless connection with various platforms, including your CRM and POS systems.
why_choose_tab_desc_3: Unlike Zceppa, Synup provides handy automation for managing reviews, running local campaigns, and updating listings seamlessly, saving you valuable time and effort.
why_choose_content_title: Synup: The Pinnacle of Digital Mastery
why_choose_content_summary: Transform Your Business with Synup – Beyond Comparison, Beyond Expectation.
testimonial_summary: Boost your online presence effortlessly with Synup's Local Listings Management. List, optimize, and monitor profiles on Google, Facebook, Yelp, and premium partner sites. Ensure consistency across search, local, voice, and social platforms. Access detailed analytics for informed decision-making. Take charge of your brand image by controlling displayed information. Synup: Where online success begins with seamless listing management.
customer_review_1_summary: Synup empowered us to drive 20% more revenue through profile personalization - the numbers speak for themselves!
customer_review_2_name: Adrian Boysell CEO of Adrian Graphics & Marketing
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is a game-changer. Every multi-location business needs to use this service.

seo.title: Need a Zceppa Alternative? Synup is the Superior Local Marketing Solution
